_comment: Deterministic QA scenario — TX1 742 Birchwood Lane NE. Source of truth for exact-count gates (BACKLOG-1848 / epic BACKLOG-1847). Every count is corpus-derived and asserted EXACTLY. Set identity is (subject, shifted-date), NEVER Message-ID.
description: TX1 742 Birchwood Lane NE, Tumwater WA — Outlook auto-link ceremony
_sourceTimezone_comment: IANA tz of the corpus authors (Tumwater WA = Pacific). The canonical checklist dates are LOCAL to this zone; the DB stores sent_at in UTC, so H3 (BACKLOG-1850) converts sent_at into this zone to match (subject, shifted-date). Consumed by scripts/qa/harness/db-assert.js. FU: H1 (BACKLOG-1848) to formalize in ScenarioManifest/zod.

seed._comment: Machine-local seeding inputs consumed by the Outlook seeder (scripts/qa/email/seed-m365.py). Adjust corpusDir/tokenFile per machine; H4 (BACKLOG-1851) owns full seed config.

searchQueries._comment: Fixed determinism query set for QA-H6 (BACKLOG-1853). Read RAW (outside H1 zod, like sourceTimezone) by scripts/qa/harness/search-attach-measure.js. Each query's EXACT expectation is derived from the committed canonical checklist by scripts/qa/harness/search-expectations.ts. kind: contact=email_participants address match (whole-corpus = canonical subset, sound because each contact is TX1-confined); subject=subject-only LIKE (TX1-confined phrase); freetext=app 3-column LIKE (subject|sender|body_plain, lower-bounded by the subject subset); bcc=participant role='bcc' + free-text non-leak invariant.
